context.projectOverview: agent-bober is a multi-agent harness that builds applications autonomously using any LLM. This sprint adds an opt-in multi-lens evaluator panel: the qualitative judge step in runAgentEvaluation can fan out into narrow-lens judges (correctness, security, regression, quality) reconciled by majority vote (fail-closed) via the already-built reconcile() reducer. Off by default it must be byte-identical to today's single-judge behavior.

gitNote: The working tree has pre-existing uncommitted changes UNRELATED to this sprint (graph CLI, agent .md files, .bober artifacts). When committing, stage ONLY the files you create/modify for THIS sprint (the contract's estimatedFiles plus any new test files). NEVER run `git add -A` or `git add .`. Use explicit paths: git add src/config/schema.ts src/config/defaults.ts src/config/schema.test.ts src/orchestrator/evaluator-agent.ts src/orchestrator/evaluator-agent.test.ts
